text: [{"thinking":"At 2750ms, the UI updates asynchronously. A new section titled \"Short tasks & surveys\" appears at the top of the Explore page, pushing the existing \"Sessions to schedule\" section down. This section contains a horizontal carousel of cards.","type":"change_ui_state","time_start_ms":2750,"time_end_ms":3300,"description":"The \"Short tasks & surveys\" section appears and expands at the top of the Explore page.","confidence":0.9,"frame_description":"The Explore page with a new section 'Short tasks & surveys' appearing at the top."},{"thinking":"The user moves the cursor to the first card in the new carousel, which is for an \"AI Interview\" paying $40.
